about: Hello! I'm a full-stack developer with a passion for creating elegant solutions to complex problems. My journey into web development started when I decided to learn coding and haven't looked back since.

Fast-forward to today, and I've had the privilege of working at an advertising agency, a start-up, and a huge corporation. My interest in web development has led me to take on more and more responsibility over the years.
When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, or sharing knowledge with the community through writing and speaking.
